name: Vegetable Minestrone
recipeIngredient: 8 cups Swiss Chard leaves, chopped (2 quarts)
1 can Chickpeas, drained and rinsed (16 oz.)
Freshly Ground Black Pepper to Taste
1/4 cup fresh Parsley or Basil, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a soup pot or large Dutch oven, heat one tablespoon of olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the leeks, celery, and onions, and season with about half a teaspoon of salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are softened, about 10 minutes.
3. Add the garlic, zucchini, and potato. Continue to cook, stirring occasionally, for about 5 minutes.
4. Add the water and remaining teaspoon of salt. Bring the mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce the heat to low and simmer until all the vegetables are tender, about 15 to 20 minutes.
6. Add the dry pasta and Swiss chard to the soup and cook, uncovered, for about 5 minutes.
7. Add chickpeas and green peas, and continue to simmer until the pasta is cooked to the "al dente" stage. Adjust the seasoning with salt and pepper.
8. Ladle soup into bowls and garnish with freshly grated Parmesan cheese and fresh parsley or basil if desired. Serve immediately.
